ddls:
CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "spkitemid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the response item */,
  "sc1" INTEGER /* Score category for the response */,
  "feature1" REAL /* Value of feature 1 */,
  "feature2" REAL /* Value of feature 2 */,
  "feature3" REAL /* Value of feature 3 */,
  "feature4" REAL /* Value of feature 4 */,
  "feature5" REAL /* Value of feature 5 */,
  "feature6" REAL /* Value of feature 6 */,
  "feature7" INTEGER /* Value of feature 7 */,
  "feature8" REAL /* Value of feature 8 */,
  "response_value" REAL /* Actual response value */,
  "response_category" TEXT /* Category of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spkitemid")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "size_in_mb" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset file in megabytes */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., continuous, categorical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  " normalization_method" TEXT /* Method used for feature normalization (e.g., Min-Max, Standardization) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the predictive model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "trained_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who trained the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated model */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature used in the model */,
  "importance" REAL /* Importance score of the feature in the model */,
  "feature_weight" REAL /* Weight of the feature in the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., dataset upload, model training) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details about the activity */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset involved in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being reviewed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being reviewed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "issues_found" TEXT /* Issues found during quality assessment */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality report */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving dataset quality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity logged (e.g., model training) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset involved in the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_members" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., admin, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id", "version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id", "version_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the deployed model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the model was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model was deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_monitoring" (
  "monitoring_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being monitored */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation */,
  "performance_metrics" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model at the time of evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("monitoring_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_monitoring_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
